title: Hello
text:
Binh Vu (pronounced like the (bad) search engine). senior at Lawrence University, will probably be in grad school soon.
About has a little more history about me, and Things reveal my impeccable taste.
Currently taking: Modern Regression, Advanced Data Computing, and Numerical Analysis.

title: Math 591 - Regressions & More
text:
A directed study under Woden Kusner (MYGOAT), hugely inspired by materials found in Modern Regression, a statistics course taught at CMU. Other sources will be added as we get deeper into the weeds.
Might be the second-most frequently updated page this term. Will be uploading my handwritten notes to the website (at least). Maybe a writeup near the end of the term, but no promises.

title: Stat 405 - Advanced Data Computing
text: Taught by the great Abhishek Chakraborty. This file will be updated with links to projects, classwork, presentations and more. Maybe not to the point of a personal portfolio, but close enough to matter.

title: Math 420 - Numerical Analysis
text:
Semi official document for Numerical Analysis, taught by the ever-calm Joe Gregg. Not sure how much I’ll actually use this file, given they are Jupyter.
If the need overtakes me, will maybe do some scribing.
